body.docCnt:
##接口调用地址 
 生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/bills/apply/batch-discard 
 测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/bills/apply/batch-discard 
 ## 接口描述 
**批量根据单据号作废申请单接口**
接口支持部分成功，返回成功的单据编号集合和失败的单据编号集合
**允许作废单据 ：**
1、通用申请单
2、差旅申请单
3、费用申请单
4、招待申请单
5、用车申请单
 
## 调用方式 
 METHOD: POST  
 CONTENT-TYPE: application/json 
## 接口输入参数 
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"type":"OBJECT","name":"root","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","required":true},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"applyBillDiscardItemList","maxLength":"20","label":"%E6%89%B9%E9%87%8F%E4%BD%9C%E5%BA%9F%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0","required":true},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"billId","maxLength":"20","label":"%E9%9C%80%E8%A6%81%E4%BD%9C%E5%BA%9F%E7%9A%84%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","desc":"%20%E6%99%BA%E8%83%BD%E8%B4%B9%E6%8E%A7%E9%9C%80%E8%A6%81%E4%BD%9C%E5%BA%9F%E7%9A%84%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"2025010100000001","required":true}}]}],"open":false}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20query%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口输出参数
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"returnCode","required":true,"label":"%E4%B8%9A%E5%8A%A1%E6%89%A7%E8%A1%8C%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"SUC0000","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","required":true,"label":"%E4%B8%9A%E5%8A%A1%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E6%89%A7%E8%A1%8C%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","exampleValue":"true","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","required":false,"label":"%E4%B8%9A%E5%8A%A1%E6%89%A7%E8%A1%8C%E6%8F%90%E7%A4%BA%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","desc":"%20%E7%B3%BB%E7%BB%9F%E6%8F%90%E7%A4%BA%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF"}},{"elementData":{"type":"OBJECT","name":"body","required":false,"label":"%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0%E4%BD%93","exampleValue":"","desc":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"successBillIdList","required":false,"label":"%E4%BD%9C%E5%BA%9F%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E7%9A%84%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7%E9%9B%86%E5%90%88","exampleValue":"%5B2025010100000001%5D","desc":"%20%E6%89%A7%E8%A1%8C%E4%BD%9C%E5%BA%9F%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E7%9A%84%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7%E9%9B%86%E5%90%88","maxLength":"20"},"children":[]},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"failedBillList","required":false,"label":"%E4%BD%9C%E5%BA%9F%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%E7%9A%84%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7%E5%92%8C%E5%8E%9F%E5%9B%A0%E9%9B%86%E5%90%88","exampleValue":"","desc":"%20%E6%89%A7%E8%A1%8C%E4%BD%9C%E5%BA%9F%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%E7%9A%84%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7%E5%92%8C%E5%8E%9F%E5%9B%A0%E9%9B%86%E5%90%88","maxLength":"20"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"billId","required":true,"label":"%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"2025010100000002","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","required":true,"label":"%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%E5%8E%9F%E5%9B%A0","exampleValue":"%E6%AD%A4%E7%94%B3%E8%AF%B7%E5%8D%95%E5%B7%B2%E4%BA%A7%E7%94%9F%E8%AE%A2%E5%8D%95%EF%BC%8C%E5%B9%B6%E4%B8%94%E6%B2%A1%E6%9C%89%E9%80%80%E7%A5%A8%EF%BC%8C%E4%B8%8D%E5%85%81%E8%AE%B8%E5%BA%9F%E5%BC%83%EF%BC%81","desc":"%20%E5%85%B7%E4%BD%93%E6%96%87%E6%9C%AC%E5%8F%AF%E5%B1%95%E7%A4%BA%EF%BC%8C%E5%A6%82%E6%9E%9C%E8%A7%A6%E5%8F%91%E4%BA%86%E5%A4%9A%E4%B8%AA%E6%A0%A1%E9%AA%8C%EF%BC%8C%E4%BC%9A%E6%8B%BC%E6%8E%A5%E5%9C%A8%E4%B8%80%E8%B5%B7"}}]}]}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口调用示例 
 ### 请求报文
```json
{
  "applyBillDiscardItemList": [
    {
      "billId": 2025010100000001
    },
    {
      "billId": 2025010100000002
    }
  ]
}
```
### 响应报文
```json
{
  "returnCode": "SUC0000",
  "success": true,
  "message": "成功",
  "body": {
    "successBillIdList": [
      2025010100000001,
      2025010100000002
    ]
  }
}
```
### 部分失败响应报文
```json
{
  "returnCode": "SUC0000",
  "success": true,
  "message": "成功",
  "body": {
    "successBillIdList": [
      2025010100000001
    ],
    "failedBillList": [
      {
        "billId": 2025010100000002,
        "message": "此申请单已产生订单，并且没有退票，不允许废弃！"
      }
    ]
  }
}
```  
## 错误码说明 
除HTTP返回码外，具体的业务异常错误码通常指的是返回报文中错误码字段的内容，常见通用错误码及解决方案请参考[通用错误码](https://xft-web-open-cs.paasoa.cmbchina.cn/#/pages/doc?id=10000&mid=14279)。
| 错误码 | 错误信息|
| --- | --- |
| E0001| 具体业务异常提示 |

接口调用地址

生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/bills/apply/batch-discard

测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/bills/apply/batch-discard

接口描述

批量根据单据号作废申请单接口 接口支持部分成功，返回成功的单据编号集合和失败的单据编号集合 允许作废单据 ： 1、通用申请单 2、差旅申请单 3、费用申请单 4、招待申请单 5、用车申请单

调用方式

METHOD: POST

CONTENT-TYPE: APPLICATION/JSON

接口输入参数

{"requestHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}],"requestBody":[{"elementData":{"type":"OBJECT","name":"root","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","required":true},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"applyBillDiscardItemList","maxLength":"20","label":"%E6%89%B9%E9%87%8F%E4%BD%9C%E5%BA%9F%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0","required":true},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"billId","maxLength":"20","label":"%E9%9C%80%E8%A6%81%E4%BD%9C%E5%BA%9F%E7%9A%84%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","desc":"%20%E6%99%BA%E8%83%BD%E8%B4%B9%E6%8E%A7%E9%9C%80%E8%A6%81%E4%BD%9C%E5%BA%9F%E7%9A%84%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"2025010100000001","required":true}}]}],"open":false}],"requestQuery":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20query%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]}

接口输出参数

{"responseHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}],"responseBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"returnCode","required":true,"label":"%E4%B8%9A%E5%8A%A1%E6%89%A7%E8%A1%8C%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"SUC0000","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","required":true,"label":"%E4%B8%9A%E5%8A%A1%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E6%89%A7%E8%A1%8C%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","exampleValue":"true","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","required":false,"label":"%E4%B8%9A%E5%8A%A1%E6%89%A7%E8%A1%8C%E6%8F%90%E7%A4%BA%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","desc":"%20%E7%B3%BB%E7%BB%9F%E6%8F%90%E7%A4%BA%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF"}},{"elementData":{"type":"OBJECT","name":"body","required":false,"label":"%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0%E4%BD%93","exampleValue":"","desc":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"successBillIdList","required":false,"label":"%E4%BD%9C%E5%BA%9F%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E7%9A%84%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7%E9%9B%86%E5%90%88","exampleValue":"%5B2025010100000001%5D","desc":"%20%E6%89%A7%E8%A1%8C%E4%BD%9C%E5%BA%9F%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E7%9A%84%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7%E9%9B%86%E5%90%88","maxLength":"20"},"children":[]},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"failedBillList","required":false,"label":"%E4%BD%9C%E5%BA%9F%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%E7%9A%84%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7%E5%92%8C%E5%8E%9F%E5%9B%A0%E9%9B%86%E5%90%88","exampleValue":"","desc":"%20%E6%89%A7%E8%A1%8C%E4%BD%9C%E5%BA%9F%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%E7%9A%84%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7%E5%92%8C%E5%8E%9F%E5%9B%A0%E9%9B%86%E5%90%88","maxLength":"20"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"billId","required":true,"label":"%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"2025010100000002","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","required":true,"label":"%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%E5%8E%9F%E5%9B%A0","exampleValue":"%E6%AD%A4%E7%94%B3%E8%AF%B7%E5%8D%95%E5%B7%B2%E4%BA%A7%E7%94%9F%E8%AE%A2%E5%8D%95%EF%BC%8C%E5%B9%B6%E4%B8%94%E6%B2%A1%E6%9C%89%E9%80%80%E7%A5%A8%EF%BC%8C%E4%B8%8D%E5%85%81%E8%AE%B8%E5%BA%9F%E5%BC%83%EF%BC%81","desc":"%20%E5%85%B7%E4%BD%93%E6%96%87%E6%9C%AC%E5%8F%AF%E5%B1%95%E7%A4%BA%EF%BC%8C%E5%A6%82%E6%9E%9C%E8%A7%A6%E5%8F%91%E4%BA%86%E5%A4%9A%E4%B8%AA%E6%A0%A1%E9%AA%8C%EF%BC%8C%E4%BC%9A%E6%8B%BC%E6%8E%A5%E5%9C%A8%E4%B8%80%E8%B5%B7"}}]}]}]}]}

接口调用示例

请求报文

{
  "applyBillDiscardItemList": [
    {
      "billId": 2025010100000001
    },
    {
      "billId": 2025010100000002
    }
  ]
}

响应报文

{
  "returnCode": "SUC0000",
  "success": true,
  "message": "成功",
  "body": {
    "successBillIdList": [
      2025010100000001,
      2025010100000002
    ]
  }
}

部分失败响应报文

{
  "returnCode": "SUC0000",
  "success": true,
  "message": "成功",
  "body": {
    "successBillIdList": [
      2025010100000001
    ],
    "failedBillList": [
      {
        "billId": 2025010100000002,
        "message": "此申请单已产生订单，并且没有退票，不允许废弃！"
      }
    ]
  }
}

错误码说明

除HTTP返回码外，具体的业务异常错误码通常指的是返回报文中错误码字段的内容，常见通用错误码及解决方案请参考通用错误码。

错误码 错误信息
E0001 具体业务异常提示
